ddt:Target.Name: C1AHS_WHUD_CAN_V1
ddt:Target.Description:
Version initiale 29/03/2019 auteur: Hajer ALILOU
Version intiliale

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: Operational Reference
Data.Comment: Always equal to the Renault/Nissan software number.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Item.Text: Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to -10?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to -9?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to -8?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to -7?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to - 6?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to - 5?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to - 4?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to - 3?DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to - 2 (DOWN)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to -1
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to ± 0 (reference)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +1 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +2 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +3 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +4 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +5 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +6 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +7 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +8 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +9 (UP)
Change the screen position (UP / DOWN) setting to +10 (UP)
Do not display the current TFT temperature [Deg] on the screen
Display current TFT temperature [Deg] on the screen

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Item.Text: SL on and inactive) or suspended
CC ON and inactive) or suspended
not equipped with CC and SL
No CC/SL over speed indication display requested
CC/SL over speed indication display requested
No involuntary SL over speed warning requested
Involuntary SL over speed warning requested
SERV and STOP are ON (alert type R3& D3)
CC/SL off or awaiting for a speed selection
Multimedia can work for all functions
Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of data for Input Output Control - the list defined here is AN EXAMPLE

Item.Text: FEB WARNING (2.5 Hz = 200 msec cycle) * Flashing
EAP WARNING (2.5 Hz = 200 msec cycle) * Flashing
TJP WARNING (2.5 Hz = 200 msec cycle) * Flashing
FCA WARNING (Car Sedan FCW) (2.5 Hz = 200 msec cycle) * Flashing
LDW WARNING (2.5 Hz = 200 msec cycle)-Inside Right * blinks
LDW WARNING (2.5 Hz = 200 msec cycle) -Inside Left * Flashing
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -10 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -9 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to - 8 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -7 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -6 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -5 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -4 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -3 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -2 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to -1 (LEFT)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to ± 0 (reference)
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 1 ?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 2 ?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 3 ?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 4 (RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 5?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 6?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 7?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 8?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 9?RIGHT?
Change the screen position (ROTATION) setting to + 10?RIGHT?
Does not display the current PWN [%] of TFT BackLight and illuminance sensor value [Lx] on the screen
Display the current PWN [%] of TFT BackLight and illuminance sensor value [Lx] on the screen"
" Change Mirror position to CURRENT POSITION (Default Position)"
" Change the Mirror position to ""MIN POSITION"""
Change the Mirror position to "MAX POSITION
" Change the Mirror position to ""STORE POSITION (Mirror Close)"""
Pause the continuous screen switching mode
" Start continuous screen switching mode While pausing, resume from the pausing screen"

Data.Name: ALL PATTERN BRIGHTNESS TEST
Data.Comment: ALL PATTERN BRIGHTNESS TEST?Brightness setting value continuous switching test)

Item.Text: Pause the continuous TFT brightness setting value switching mode
"Start continuous TFT brightness setting value switching mode While paused, resume from the setting value of the stop"

Data.Name: ALL PATTERN AUTO DIMMING CURVE TEST
Data.Comment: ALL PATTERN AUTO DIMMING CURVE TEST?Illuminance sensor 20 STEP continuous switching test?

Item.Text: Pause the continuous illumination sensor STEP switching mode
"Start continuous illumination sensor STEP switching mode While paused, resume from the setting value of the stop"

Data.Name: ALL PATTERN ILLMINATION CONTROL DUTY TEST
Data.Comment: ALL PATTERN ILLMINATION CONTROL DUTY TEST

Item.Text: Temporarily stop the brightness switching mode due to continuous change of the Ircon setting value
"Start the brightness switching mode by continuous change of the setting value of Ircon While paused, resume from the setting value of the stop"
Hide "LATTICE screen" with the screen calibration value for Panasonic adjusted at Panasonic factory applied
Display the "LATTICE screen" with the screen calibration value for Panasonic adjusted at the Panasonic factory applied.
Hide the "LATTICE screen" with the screen calibration values ??for Nissan adjusted at the Nissan plant applied
Display the "LATTICE screen" with the screen calibration value for Nissan adjusted at the Nissan plant applied

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen
